title: Merge Conflict Resolution: src/tickets/index.ts
description: Resolved two conflict regions merging HLX-342 ticket-ref resolution with staging's --run flag support

steps.title: Usage text: artifacts --run flag added
steps.description: Merged ticket branch's <ticket-ref> terminology and exitCode parameter with staging's [--run <runId>] option on the artifacts subcommand.

steps.title: Artifacts case: help + resolver + rest passthrough
steps.description: Kept the ticket branch's isHelpRequested check and extractTicketRef/resolveTicket pattern. Added rest as third argument to cmdTicketsArtifacts so the --run flag from staging is supported. Updated help text to mention [--run <runId>].
